'''Scardia Station''', also '''Space Station Scardia''', was a cubical [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Null Zone/Legends|Null Zone]].

==History==
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], it served as headquarters for the<ref name="TLCotJ" /> false [[Supreme Prophet]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]], the pseudo-[[Rajah Ubooki|Kadann]].<ref name="SPIN" /> Scardia also functioned as a palacial receiving chamber used to overawe supplicants with displays of the Prophets' vast wealth.<ref name="TLCotJ" />

Seeking revenge on the true [[Kadann]],<ref name="Insider66" /> and believing the pseudo-Kadann to be the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Emperor's Mage]] whom he imitated, [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati]]<ref name="SPIN" /> brought every weapon in his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to bear on Scardia Station, destroying it<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|190|Kadann}}</ref> and killing the Prophets.<ref name="SPIN" />

After this, [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] of the [[Greater Maldrood]] plundered the space station of its treasures, adding them to his growing hoard.<ref name="Imperial Warlords">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-2|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>

==Design==
===Chamber of Dark Visions===
This chamber was supposedly used by the [[Church of the Dark Side]] as a location through which they divined future events.

===Chamber of Dark Justice===
A room designed to serve as a court room where judgment was held on traitors that were charged with working against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''
*[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']]
